title: RBI Circular on UAPA Sanctions Compliance and UNSC List Updates
description: <cite index="41-11">RBI advised regulated entities to ensure compliance with UAPA sanctions relating to UNSC lists of individuals and entities suspected of terrorist links.</cite> <cite index="54-11">Regulated entities were advised to take appropriate action in terms of RBI Directions and strictly follow procedures as laid down in the UAPA Order dated February 02, 2021 (amended April 22, 2024).</cite> This affects banks and NBFCs' KYC and account management procedures.
